elements.name: Service request portal
elements.notes: Self-service web form for hardware, software, and access requests. Integrated with the ITSM platform.

elements.name: Requester submits IT request
elements.notes: Employee fills in and submits the self-service form describing their hardware, software, or access need.

elements.name: Approval notification email
elements.notes: Automated email sent to requester and manager when a ticket enters the approval queue.

elements.name: ITSM approval workflow
elements.notes: Routes requests to the appropriate approver based on cost threshold and request type.

elements.name: Provisioning pipeline
elements.notes: Automated provisioning of accounts, licences, and devices triggered on approval.

elements.name: Access rights grant
elements.notes: Writes to Active Directory and SaaS app connectors to apply the approved permissions.

elements.name: Helpdesk ticketing interface
elements.notes: Post-delivery support channel. Requester raises follow-up issues here if provisioning fails.

elements.name: Service desk agent handles follow-up
elements.notes: Agent reviews the requester's issue, consults provisioning logs, and either resolves or escalates.

elements.name: Long wait times for complex requests
elements.notes: Multi-approver chains for high-cost requests regularly exceed SLA of 3 business days.
